description_long: This object is a medium-sized bird with a streamlined body and a slightly hunched posture. Its plumage is predominantly dark gray with subtle brownish tones, especially along the wings and back, and a lighter underbelly. The head is rounded with a short, pointed beak that is dark in color, and the eyes are set forward, giving it a focused expression. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail feathers are somewhat scruffy and extend straight back, with visible separation between the feathers. The legs and feet are thin and appear to be a muted gray or brown, with the toes splayed out behind the body. Overall, the bird has a sleek, compact appearance, suitable for perching or foraging in urban environments.
description: A medium-sized, dark gray bird with a pointed beak, compact body, and scruffy tail feathers, featuring subtle brownish tones and thin legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, folded wings, and elongated tail feathers.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed beak, rounded head, and symmetrical body shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bird's profile, wing contour, and tail feather separation.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the spread of the tail feathers and the splayed toes of the feet.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark gray with subtle brownish gradients on wings and back
